title: Extra Bows x Better Bows
description: An alternate resource pack for the "Extra Bows" datapack that allows it to work with Better Bows.
body:
This is an alternative resource pack for [Extra Bows](https://modrinth.com/datapack/extra-bows) datapack that makes it work with [Better Bows](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-bows) by Ewan Howell. This simply makes them all 3D and show what arrow type they are currently using.

Sample images:

Netherite Bow

![Netherite Bow but 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61d447b1c5427c10a38ee69fb7c65c18b56fc9f3.png)

Netherite Crossbow

![Netherite Crossbow but 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b52ba60588097593e1beef8d12bc958a547537fd.png)

Netherite Crossbow + Multishot + Spectral Arrows

![Netherite Crossbow but with Multishot and Spectral Arrows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eac0f5d8f8ec090972a180ea9fd09f8933a25c0.png)

Pack order is as follows:

![Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e25630ba2ffe9ecef9fd4c997722cfc42e2eca55.png)
